sheet.text: Details Inspector Close Decision Metrics Boundary Evidence Selected replay window LEO re-entry State 4 of 5 Replay UTC 2026-04-28T10:11:42.472Z Sim replay 01:20 / 01:54 Source provenance Evidence for the selected replay window. The scene narrative and sequence rail remain primary. Decision · State Evidence LEO 候選回來 · LEO re-entry 有新的 LEO 進入候選範圍。依位置條件預測，切回後可有約 22 分鐘低延遲。MEO 仍在接住，沒有立即必須切的壓力。 NowNow: MEO remains primary while LEO is only a candidate. WhyWhy: position conditions recovered enough for LEO evaluation. NextNext: the sequence closes on GEO guard coverage. WatchWatch: candidate quality class and evaluation time, not active service truth. LEO returns as a candidate review focus in window 4 of 5. The next state closes the sequence on GEO guard context. Continuity here is modeled, not measured. Metrics Modeled classes Modeled link quality: LEO candidate class, not primary service proof. Communication time: approximate remaining evaluation time. Unavailable measured data Unavailable measured data: no ping, iperf, ESTNeT/INET, DUT, latency, jitter, throughput, or packet-loss feed is connected to this route. Unavailable physical factors: rain, antenna, ITU/V group, and rain attenuation models are not connected in this scene. Boundary · Truth Boundary Truth boundary Simulation boundary: 13-actor demo, repo-owned projection, not measured truth. Service-layer boundary: modeled service handover, not native RF handover. Endpoint boundary: operator-family precision, not site-level gateway claim. Scale boundary: not >=500 LEO validation and not 24h hardware-GPU closeout. simulation outputoperator-family precisiondisplay-context actors Simulated display-context state, not an operator handover log.Source-lineaged display-context actors, not active serving satellites.Endpoint precision stays operator-family only.No active gateway assignment is claimed.No pair-specific teleport path is claimed.No measured latency, jitter, throughput, or continuity values are shown.No native RF handover is claimed. Evidence Source provenance All repo-owned projection sources. TLE source summary: CelesTrak NORAD GP records are retained through the repo-owned projection. Endpoint evidence: Taiwan / CHT and Singapore / Speedcast are operator-family evidence only. R2 archive: read-only provenance, not a precision mode or runtime selector.
